title: What Happens When You Bring Back Nature @Florence Fang Community Farm
content:
What Happens When You Bring Back Nature @Florence Fang Community Farm
vi the leaf
1220 subscribers
15 likes
263 views
11 Oct 2023
I loved hearing the hummingbird and chinese elders story Kelley told at Florence Fang! The stories Kelley and Teddy shared were really heartwarming and I really wanted to find a way to share them and more about the farm. It was great to learn more about Florence Fang Community Farm and how much they have grown; so cool to see a community come together and grow this beautiful space from barren land. This was a lovely wrap up to the collaboration I did with Kelley, and I think I learned a lot about birds, video production and community gardens! Thanks for watching this, let me know if you've had any experience being in a community garden :)
